{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "20. Daudf arridsan no da-
fhadeem Laudim pee teem ta-
pulzinajahs ta patt ka Siffeni
jeb ka Vihchli wirs Semmes:
Jo tee ne bija isskuitami preektw
tahs leelas Draudses.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "21. Un tee isgabje no Nint-
wes treju Deemu Gahjuma prett
to Lanbu Bektilet/ un apmet-
tahs pee Bektilata/ tuwu peeta
Kalna/ kas tat augschajat Kiliki-
jai pa labbo Rohkn gull.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "22. Un wiꞥſch nehme wiffu fa-
wu Karra-Spehku/ tohs Kahji-
neekus un Jahtneekus/ un fawus
Rattus/ un pagahje turp us
tahm Kalnn-Weetahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "23. Un isdeldeja Pudu un
Ludu/ un tspohstija wiffus Raf-
fiterus un Jſmaeliterus/kas prett
Tukfnesi dsihwoja/ tat Semmet
Kellon prett Deenas-Widdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "24. Un wiꞥſch zehlahs pahr to
Wrattu/ un gahje zaux Meso-
potamiju/ un tspohstija wiffue
augstus Pilsfahthus/ kas pee tahs
Uppes Arbonas gulleja/ tamehr
nahk lihds Juhrai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "25. Un wiꞥſch usnehme tahe
Kilikijas Rohbeschahs/ un isdel-
deja wiffus/ kas tam prettitur-
rejahs/ un nahze lihds Joppee
tihk.
Rohbeschahin prett Deenas-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "26. Wiꞥſch avflehdsse arrids-
wiffus Midijaniterus/ un eei
dsinaja winnu Dsihwoktus/
ispohtija winnu Laidarus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "27. Un wiꞥſch nogahje us
Laufu Damaskus Kweef-
Pfanzchanas Latka/ un eeded
naja wiffus winnu Tihrumu
un likke fihkus un keelus Lohp-
nobaut/ un aptauptja win-
Pilsfahtus/ pohtija winnu Je-
imus/ un nokawe wiffus win-
Jaunektus ar Sohbina Afmir
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "28. Un Bihjafchana un Ba-
liba-preektch winna kritte pa-
wiffeem/ kas Juhras puſſe dsi-
woja/ kas Sibdana un Tihru-
bija/un kasSurá un Okimádsi-
woja un pahr wiffjeim Jemmi-
nes Eedsihwotajeem; Un tee ka-
Asdodá un Asklona dsihwoja-
bihjajahs tohti preektch winna
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
1. Ad fuhttja tee Weh-
Sneschus pee winna
Vineerigeem WahrDeen
un likke fazziht :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Raugi/ mehs Kalpita le-
la- Kehnika Nebukadnezara
sam tawa Preektcha/ darri
mums ka tew patihk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Raugi/ wiff muhsu Dfi-
wokti/un wiffi auglige Tihrum-
ir fibft un leeli Lohvi/ un wiff-
Ehkas to Laidaru trr tar-
Preekschá/ darri/ ta tas tew p
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Medsi/ arridsan muh-
P
"
    }
